name: EKS Cluster
description: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service managed cluster

inputs.name: kubernetes_version
inputs.label: Kubernetes Version
inputs.description: Kubernetes version for the EKS control plane

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.label: VPC ID
inputs.description: ID of the VPC where the cluster will be deployed

inputs.name: subnet_ids
inputs.label: Subnet IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated subnet IDs for the control plane and node groups

inputs.name: endpoint_public_access
inputs.label: Public API Endpoint
inputs.description: Allow access to the Kubernetes API from the internet

inputs.name: endpoint_private_access
inputs.label: Private API Endpoint
inputs.description: Allow access to the Kubernetes API from within the VPC

inputs.name: authentication_mode
inputs.label: Authentication Mode
inputs.description: Authentication mode for the cluster. API_AND_CONFIG_MAP supports both EKS Access Entries and aws-auth ConfigMap

inputs.name: enable_cluster_creator_admin_permissions
inputs.label: Creator Admin Access
inputs.description: Automatically give the cluster creator full admin permissions via an EKS Access Entry

inputs.name: endpoint_public_access_cidrs
inputs.label: Public Access CIDRs
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of CIDR blocks that can access the public API server endpoint

inputs.name: deletion_protection
inputs.label: Deletion Protection
inputs.description: Prevent accidental cluster deletion. Must be disabled before destroying.

inputs.name: enabled_log_types
inputs.label: Control Plane Log Types
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of control plane log types to send to CloudWatch

inputs.name: eks_managed_node_groups
inputs.label: Managed Node Groups
inputs.description: Define EKS managed node groups with instance type and scaling configuration.

inputs.name: install_core_addons
inputs.label: Install Core Addons
inputs.description: Install essential Kubernetes addons (VPC CNI, CoreDNS, kube-proxy). Required for nodes to become Ready.

inputs.name: fargate_profiles
inputs.label: Fargate Profiles (HCL)
inputs.description: Map of Fargate profile definitions for serverless pods

inputs.name: access_entries
inputs.label: Access Entries (HCL)
inputs.description: Map of access entries to add to the cluster for IAM principals

inputs.name: cluster_addons
inputs.label: Extra Cluster Addons (HCL)
inputs.description: Additional EKS add-ons beyond the core set (vpc-cni, coredns, kube-proxy)
